name: Example: EMA Cross Strategy
thesis: Testing 20/50 EMA cross on BTC 4H. Long when 20 crosses above 50, exit on reverse cross. Risk 1% per trade.
notes: Worked well in trending markets, got chopped in range. Need to add trend filter (ADX > 25).
learnings: EMA crosses lag too much in fast reversals
ADX filter would improve win rate
